name: LaunchDarkly
description: LaunchDarkly — Observability / Logging / Tracing tool for developers

seo.title: LaunchDarkly Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete LaunchDarkly analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Observability / Logging / Tracing.

lock_in.explanation: Medium-High — Contexts with, 35+ SDK creat to andand

when_to_use: Need targeting by user context (plan, region, etc.)
when_not_to_use: Want open-source — use Flagsmith or Unleash
Just need basic toggles — Statsig free tier is generous

migration_cheatsheet.risk_notes: Medium-High — Contexts with, 35+ SDK creat to andand
migration_cheatsheet.tip: Plan 2-4 weeks minimum. Consider running parallel during migration

review.verdict: Best for enterprise feature management at scale. LaunchDarkly offers $10/user/mo (Starter). High vendor lock-in.
pros: targeting by user context (plan, region, etc.)
Centralized logs, metrics, and traces in one place
cons: High lock-in — proprietary APIs make migration difficult
